_comment: Copy this file to appsettings.Development.json and fill in real values. The Development.json file is gitignored and never committed.

ConnectionStrings.DefaultConnection: Host=localhost;Port=5433;Database=MarketSystemDB;Username=postgres;Password=REPLACE_WITH_LOCAL_PASSWORD;Pooling=true;Minimum Pool Size=2;Maximum Pool Size=100;Connection Idle Lifetime=300;Timeout=30;Command Timeout=30
